description: Logic Recognition Patterns, Safety Rules, and Best Practices

Master_Trip.description: Multi-input OR gate for interlock trip.

engineering_rules.RULE_DO_DB_PAIRING: Every DO instruction must have a corresponding DB status.
engineering_rules.RULE_AO_F07_PROTECTION: Every AO must be preceded by F07 (COUT) for rate/clamping.
engineering_rules.RULE_CRD_AUTHORITY: CRD (Tag Data) has Tripartite Authority: R/W directly in BLS, Write-Only via Output Pattern assignment in SEQ, and Write-Only via F66 (EHLD) KFNO parameter in DDC. It represents a [Tag Assignment] intent.

safety_rules.Bumpless_Handover: Sequential AMPR blocks must link LL to X1.
